XGeoRTR 0.3.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

as_xgeo_data()
Coerce inputs to xgeo_data
build_xgeo_lod()
Build density-grid LOD summaries for a scene
compute_xgeo_diagnostics()
Compute embedding diagnostics for a scene
compute_xgeo_embedding()
Compute and attach a platform embedding
geom_xgeo_density()
Add a density-grid layer
geom_xgeo_points()
Add a point-cloud layer
geom_xgeo_surface()
Add a generic surface layer
new_xgeo_data()
Create a normalized xgeo_data object
read_xgeo_scene()
Read a scene from JSON
render_webgl()
Render an xgeo_scene to rgl / WebGL
render_xgeo_layer()
Render one xgeo_layer
set_active_embedding()
Set the active embedding on a scene
set_xgeo_lod()
Set the active level-of-detail state on a scene
set_xgeo_selection()
Set explicit point and feature selection on a scene
snapshot_webgl()
Save a static snapshot of an xgeo_scene when available
validate_xgeo_data()
Validate a xgeo_data object
write_xgeo_scene()
Write a scene to JSON
xgeo_scene()
Create an xgeo_scene

Developed by Frederic Bertrand.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
